final:
module top_module(
    input [31:0] in1,
    input [31:0] in2,
    input enable,
    output reg [31:0] out
);always @(*) begin
        if(enable) begin
            out = in1 + in2;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= 32'hFFFFFFFF;
    end
  end

endmodule
